name: VMware Fusion
description: Virtualization for running Windows and other operating systems on Mac

version_check.fallback_homebrew: Homebrew cask disabled June 2025 but may still have version in repo history

download.note: REQUIRES Broadcom account (support.broadcom.com). No public direct download.

changelog.note: Gated behind Broadcom portal auth for specific version release notes

notes: Free for personal use since Nov 2024 (Broadcom acquisition). Downloads REQUIRE Broadcom account. No public version-check API. Version naming changed from 13.x to year-semester (e.g., 26H1). Homebrew cask disabled June 2025. MOST LOCKED-DOWN app — automated update checking is extremely difficult.
